data.current_description: Query the database directly with filters, dimensions, and metrics. Results are cached for 10 minutes. Supports gzip compression.

message: Operation 'executeRealTimeQuery' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, vague_description. Original description is too vague about inputs, outputs, and use cases. Added schema references, clarified the lookback window parameter purpose, specified return data type, and explained the typical latency and use case for real-time monitoring to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Query real-time database with a lookback window in minutes.
data.description_suggestion: Query real-time analytics data using a specified lookback window in minutes. Accepts RealTimeQueryRequest with query parameters and returns RealTimeQueryResponse with current analytics metrics and events. Provides near real-time data with typical 2-minute latency for monitoring active user behavior and events.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about inputs, outputs, and use cases. Added schema references, clarified the lookback window parameter purpose, specified return data type, and explained the typical latency and use case for real-time monitoring to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Fetch raw sessions from the database with filtering and pagination.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve raw session data with filtering and pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve raw session-level data from the database. Accepts SessionsRequest with filters, pagination parameters, and date range. data.current_description: Access real-time event data. Data retained for 1 hour with typical 2-minute delay.
